calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Vacated

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC.'s Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Plaintiff Environmental Health Advocates, Inc's Motion to Approve Settlement Pursuant to Health and Safety Code Section 25249.7(f)(4) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' Amended [Proposed] Judgment Pursuant to terms of Proposition 65 Settlement and Consent Judgment at to Defendant Buth-Na-Bodhaige, Inc. and Amended [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Continued To Aug-04-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Continued To Jul-07-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Janani Natarajan, Esq. 619-629-0527, Entorno Law LLP for Plaintiff.
Ryan Landis, Esq. 949-467-9500 CMBG3 for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the tentative ruling is appearance required and raises issues on counsels' request stated on the contest emails. Ms. Natajaran informs the Court the Attorney General requests certain revisions to the consent judgment and requests to continue. Mr. Landis states the Attorney general is not ok with the language. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH ADVOCATES, INC.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Continued to July 7, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. Any subsequent filings shall be consistent with the 7/7/23 hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Set For Trial On Sep-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
